nasb.text: and He will reign over the house of Jacob forever, and His kingdom will have no end.”

esv.text: and he will reign over the house of Jacob forever, and of his kingdom there will be no end.”

cnv.text: 他要作王統治雅各家，直到永遠，他的國沒有窮盡。”

ccb.text: 祂要永远统治以色列，祂的国度永无穷尽。”

csbs.text: 他要做王统管雅各家，直到永远， 他的国度没有穷尽。”
